top_3_gaps: Missing 'Pin' icon in the top right chrome compared to Manus
Persistent down-chevron next to the title in NodeBench, whereas Manus hides it until tapped
Slightly lower contrast on secondary text ('No sources attached yet') compared to Manus's secondary text
top_3_wins: Pixel-perfect replication of the 3-dot menu bottom sheet and its icons
Identical composer layout, affordances, and safe area handling
Smooth, native-feeling bottom sheet transition that matches the target

top_chrome.delta: NodeBench is missing the Pin icon and adds a persistent chevron to the title.

composer_pinning.manus: Pinned above bottom safe area with blur/solid background
composer_pinning.nodebench: Pinned above bottom safe area with matching background

bottom_nav.manus: Not present in this detail view
bottom_nav.nodebench: Not present in this detail view

safe_area_handling.manus: Proper padding around the home indicator
safe_area_handling.nodebench: Proper padding around the home indicator

header_treatment.manus: Medium weight, clean alignment for step headers
header_treatment.nodebench: Medium weight, slightly larger relative size for 'Task progress'
header_treatment.delta: NodeBench's section header feels slightly more prominent, but acceptable.

weight_hierarchy.manus: Clear distinction between titles, body, and metadata

transitions.manus: Smooth bottom sheet slide-up for menus
transitions.nodebench: Smooth bottom sheet slide-up for menus

loading_states.nodebench: Shows active spinning loaders for in-progress steps
loading_states.delta: NodeBench loaders are smooth, though stroke width is slightly thicker than Manus's typical iconography.

text_contrast.manus: Strong contrast for primary, accessible contrast for secondary
text_contrast.nodebench: Strong primary, secondary text ('No sources attached yet') feels slightly too dim
text_contrast.delta: NodeBench secondary text might fail WCAG AA contrast slightly compared to Manus.

composer.delta: Placeholder text differs ('Message Manus' vs 'Message NodeBench...'), but affordances are identical.

artifact_rail.manus_presence: Shows attached files and generated markdown
artifact_rail.nodebench_presence: Not present in this specific in-progress state
artifact_rail.delta: Unmatched context (NodeBench is showing an earlier phase of a task).

cognitive_load.manus: High but managed via progressive disclosure
cognitive_load.nodebench: High but managed via progressive disclosure

tap_target_sizes.manus: 44pt+ for top chrome and menu items
tap_target_sizes.nodebench: 44pt+ for top chrome and menu items

prioritized_punch_list.problem: Secondary text ('No sources attached yet') is slightly too dark and may fail contrast checks.
prioritized_punch_list.fix: Lighten the hex value of secondary text to match Manus's secondary text contrast ratio.
Add the Pin icon to the top right action group if the feature exists, or adjust spacing to compensate.

prioritized_punch_list.problem: Persistent down-chevron next to the title.
prioritized_punch_list.fix: Remove the chevron unless it's an active, tap-able dropdown in this specific view, to match Manus's cleaner default state.

honest_assessment.can_nodebench_demo_tomorrow: Yes. The UI is a near-perfect clone of the target app. It feels native, snappy, and visually identical in almost all respects.
honest_assessment.biggest_risk_in_demo: Users noticing missing functional parity (like the missing Pin icon) rather than UI flaws, as the UI itself is rock solid.
quick_wins_before_demo: Bump the brightness of secondary text slightly
Remove the title chevron if it doesn't do anything
Ensure the loading spinner stroke width matches the icon set
